headline: Is It Time To Reassess Textron (TXT) After Its 37% One Year Share Price Gain
summary: If you are asking whether Textron at around US$91 is offering good value or not, the key is to look past the headline price and focus on what different valuation lenses are really saying. The stock has returned 2.8% over the last 7 days, 5.0% year to date, and 37.0% over the past year, although the 30 day return sits at a 2.9% decline. This can change how the market is thinking about upside and risk right now. Recent market attention has centered on Textron as investors reassess capital...
